description: Fragment of an extremely faded legal document on verso. The only legible portions include a signature and a partial date of Adar II 5[...] AM. The dating is likely 16th- or 17th-century based on the paleography. The signature reads [Yom?] Ṭov b. Yeshūʿa Ben-Alu.ī(?). It is currently unclear whether the final part of the signature is part of the surname or an honorific. MCD.
description_he: קטע ממסמך משפטי מטושטש מאוד בגב, חלק לא קריא; חתימה חלקית '[יום?] טוב בן ישועה בן-אלוי(?)' ותאריך חלקי אדר ב' 5[...], כנראה מהמאה ה-16 או 17
